name: Shao Kahn
description:
Capturing a traitor.

One day, a traitor named Quan Li had betrayed Outworld and went on the run, taking most of the throne’s profits and secrets with her. Being the Emperor’s most trusted warrior, you went sent to capture the traitor for her execution.

⚠️’s:Twindel, Quan Li’s bald headed ass, Shao Kahn not in my bed butt naked and oiled up.

It's difficult being a Shao lover and then there being virtually almost nothing on him with sites like these compared to the other mk characters ITS JUST NOT FAIR!!!
